untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (quick rise, quick decline, decline stalls near trend-line support) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. Trend-line support is a visual/graphical construct not available in the indicator set. The pattern's contextual dependency (avoid shorts in bull markets unless warranted) requires regime detection that cannot be precisely formalized without explicit trend-line detection and pattern completion confirmation logic.
translation_notes: Eve & Adam is a visual candlestick pattern requiring identification of: (1) rapid price ascent, (2) rapid descent, (3) stall near support trend-line, (4) market regime context. While approximated using price above/below SMA_20 and positive returns, this does not capture the pattern's true mechanics. Author parameters are silent on quantitative thresholds, making precise translation impossible. Recommend implementing pattern detection via custom candlestick analysis module or providing explicit support level input.
